subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! At this moment when the courier is in great haste and this servant is occupied with writing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در این وقت که برید تعجیل شدید دارد و این عبد بتحریر مشغول در این
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @contention and conflict, @unity; oneness of humanity
